_meta.description: Feature tracking for HR Command Center. Status: not-started | in-progress | pass | fail | blocked

basic-chat-ui.notes: All components complete: AppShell, ChatInput, MessageBubble, MessageList, TypingIndicator

claude-api-integration.notes: All tasks complete (1.4.1-1.4.6). Streaming responses working.

network-detection.notes: Hybrid detection (browser events + API check), amber indicator in header

employee-data.notes: 2.1.1-2.1.21 complete: Schema, CRUD, file parser, import UIs, test data generation + import. 100 employees, 237 ratings, 237 reviews, 221 eNPS imported with verified FK integrity.

company-profile.notes: 2.2.1-2.2.4 complete: company.rs CRUD, CompanySetup component, gated onboarding flow. State = HQ/incorporation (single), employee work states tracked separately.

context-builder.notes: 2.3.1-2.3.6 + 2.7.0-2.7.5 complete: context.rs, Alex persona, employee context, user_name, token budget, selected employee prioritization, OrgAggregates, classify_query(), query-adaptive retrieval, system prompt with aggregates. 63 context tests passing.

cross-conversation-memory.notes: 2.4.1-2.4.4 complete: memory.rs (8 tests), useConversationSummary hook, Tauri commands, Cmd+N shortcut. Summaries generated on new conversation.

conversation-management.notes: Complete: Backend CRUD (7 commands, 7 tests), ConversationContext (auto-save, auto-title), tabbed sidebar UI (ConversationSidebar, TabSwitcher, ConversationCard, ConversationSearch).

stickiness-features.notes: 2.6.1-2.6.3 complete: PromptSuggestions component, usePromptSuggestions hook, contextual empty state guidance. Three context modes: empty (setup), general (team), employee-selected (personalized).

pii-scanner.notes: 3.1.1-3.1.5 complete: pii.rs with SSN, credit card (Visa/MC/Amex/Discover), bank account detection. Luhn validation for CC, context keywords for bank accounts. 31 unit tests passing.

auto-redaction.notes: 3.2.1-3.2.3 complete: scan_pii Tauri command, frontend integration in ConversationContext.sendMessage(), user sees redacted text in message bubble

pii-notification-ui.notes: 3.3.1-3.3.3 complete: PIINotification component, amber slide-in banner, 3s auto-dismiss, X to close early

audit-logging.notes: 3.4.1-3.4.4 complete: audit.rs (11 tests), 5 Tauri commands, TS wrappers, frontend integration. Logs redacted requests, responses, employee IDs. CSV export support.

error-handling.notes: 3.5.1-3.5.4 complete: ErrorMessage component, error categorization (6 types), Retry/Copy actions, offline mode in ChatInput. error-utils.ts for categorization.

onboarding-flow.notes: 7-step wizard complete: Welcome, API Key, Company, Employees (auto-loads sample), Disclaimer, Telemetry, First Prompt. 11 files, ~1,100 LOC.

settings-panel.notes: Modal with API key, company profile, data path display, telemetry toggle. ~200 LOC, 6 files. Fixed onboarding context bug.

data-export-import.notes: AES-256-GCM encrypted backups with Argon2 key derivation. Full backup of all 9 tables. ~800 LOC Rust, ~280 LOC React. 6 unit tests.

monday-digest.notes: 4.4.1-4.4.4 complete: MondayDigest component, useMondayDigest hook, find_recent_hires query, get_digest_data command. Shows anniversaries (7 days) and new hires (90 days) on first launch of week. ~330 LOC across 8 files.

distribution.notes: 5.1.1-5.1.5 complete: code signing, notarization, auto-updater, GitHub Actions release workflow

api-key-setup-guide.notes: V2.1.1a-e complete: Plain-language explainer, step-by-step guide, contextual error hints (OpenAI vs Anthropic detection), cost estimator, troubleshooting FAQ. 3 files, ~280 new LOC.

command-palette.notes: V2.1.2a-d complete: CommandPalette with Fuse.js fuzzy search, useCommandPalette hook, shortcuts (⌘K, ⌘/, ⌘E, ⌘,), keyboard hints in header. 2 new files, ~405 LOC.

persona-switcher.notes: V2.1.3a-d complete: 5 personas (Alex, Jordan, Sam, Morgan, Taylor), PersonaSelector component, Settings integration, immediate effect. ~270 LOC across 6 files, 4 new tests.

answer-verification.notes: V2.1.4a-d complete: Verify numeric claims against SQL ground truth, VerificationBadge component with expandable details + Show SQL, tolerance matching (counts exact, ratings ±0.1, percentages ±1%). ~500 LOC across 10 files, 11 new tests.

structured-data-extraction.notes: V2.2.1 complete (all 7 subtasks): Schema + highlights.rs + extraction pipeline + context builder integration + auto-trigger on import. Fire-and-forget async extraction on review create/import.

query-adaptive-retrieval-v2.notes: V2.2.2 complete: Dynamic excerpting, theme-based retrieval, token budgets, retrieval metrics. Fixed name detection for HR nouns, SQL column search, and dept substring matching (word boundary fix). 235 reviews extracted, 87 summaries generated.

critical-accessibility-fixes.notes: V2.2.5a complete: Color contrast upgraded (stone-400 → stone-500), touch targets increased to 40px minimum, global focus-visible ring system, prefers-reduced-motion support. 26 component files updated.

design-token-completion.notes: V2.2.5b complete: Primary color scale (200-900), custom easing curves (smooth-out, smooth-in, smooth-in-out), shadow scale (lg, xl, 2xl), letter-spacing tokens (tight, wide, wider).

component-consistency.notes: V2.2.5c complete: UI primitives (/components/ui/) with Button, Badge, Card, Avatar. EmployeeDetail decomposed (619→192 lines). EmployeePanel migrated to use Avatar. ~640 LOC new, ~380 LOC removed.

motion-refinements.notes: V2.2.5d complete: Replaced button scale transforms with shadow/brightness for smoother hover effects. Slowed loading spinners from 1s to 1.5s (animate-spin-slow). 16 files updated. OfflineIndicator kept fast for quick status checks.

analytics-panel.notes: V2.3.2a-f+ complete: Analytics request schema, NL→SQL templates, Recharts rendering (bar/pie), filter captions, fallback handling. Chart coverage expanded 14→24 combinations (60%); user chart type override (suggested_chart honored). ~1,300 LOC across 10 files.

insight-canvas-foundation.notes: V2.3.2g complete: Database schema (3 tables), insight_canvas.rs CRUD (~540 LOC), TypeScript types, 13 Tauri commands. Foundation for persistent chart storage.

pin-to-canvas.notes: V2.3.2h complete: Pin button in AnalyticsChart, BoardSelectorModal for selecting/creating boards, analyticsRequest stored on Message, pinChart() integration. ~210 LOC new.

named-boards-ui.notes: V2.3.2i complete: Boards sidebar tab, InsightBoardPanel (list/create/delete), InsightBoardView modal (chart grid, rename, unpin). ~450 LOC across 4 new files.

chart-annotations.notes: V2.3.2j complete: ChartAnnotationForm (Note/Callout/Question types), ChartAnnotationList with edit/delete, integrated into InsightBoardView. ~180 LOC across 2 new files.

report-export.notes: V2.3.2k complete: PrintableReport component, @media print CSS styles, Export button in board view. Browser-based print with clean formatting. ~220 LOC.

chart-drilldown.notes: V2.3.2l complete: DrilldownModal, drilldown-utils.ts (buildEmployeeFilter), onClick handlers in AnalyticsChart. Extended EmployeeFilter with gender/ethnicity. ~200 LOC across 3 files.

attrition-signals.notes: V2.4.1 complete: Team-level attention signals with heuristic scoring (tenure×0.35 + performance×0.35 + engagement×0.30). Rust backend (signals.rs ~450 LOC, 19 tests), AttentionAreasCard + TeamThemeModal UI, Settings toggle with first-use disclaimer. MIN_TEAM_SIZE=5 privacy filter. ~800 LOC total.

fairness-lens.notes: V2.4.2 complete: Demographic representation analysis (gender/ethnicity). Rust backend (dei.rs ~400 LOC, 19 tests), FairnessLensCard UI (representation, rating parity, promotion rates tabs), Settings toggle with first-use disclaimer. Small-n suppression (MIN_GROUP_SIZE=5), audit trail with query_category. ~1,080 LOC total.

audit-remediation.notes: V2.4.5 complete: All 28 audit findings resolved. Security (S1-S8): parameterized SQL, Keychain migration, CSP, rehype-sanitize, expanded PII, redacted audit responses, sanitized errors. Accessibility (A1-A10): focus trap, chart screen reader, keyboard nav, form labels, ARIA attributes. Performance (P1-P10): split contexts, buffered streaming, N+1 fix, lazy loading, useMemo, React.memo. ~1,455 LOC added, ~580 removed across 30 files.

data-quality-center.notes: V2.5.1 complete: Backend data_quality.rs (1,375 LOC, 28 tests) + 9 Tauri commands + frontend pipeline (useImportPipeline, ColumnMappingStep, ValidationStep, FixAndRetryStep, DedupeStep, HrisPresetSelector). All 4 import types refactored. 308 Rust tests passing. +5,264/-626 lines across 19 files.

distribution.notes: 5.1.1-5.1.5 complete: App icon, code signing, notarization, auto-updater, GitHub Actions release workflow.

trial-infrastructure.notes: 5.2.1-5.2.4 complete: Cloudflare Workers proxy (KV quota, model override, streaming passthrough), device_id.rs, trial.rs (dual-path chat routing, employee limit, message tracking), TrialContext + TrialBanner + UpgradePrompt (soft/hard), message counter badge, employee limit progress bar, Settings upgrade section. 317 Rust tests passing.

license-system.notes: 5.3.1-5.3.4 complete: Remote validation with device_id + seat limits (2 devices), fail-open offline, strict HRC-XXXX×6 format validation, license key input UI in Settings.

payment-integration.notes: 5.4.1-5.4.4 complete: Stripe product ($99), checkout flow, license key generation (HRC-XXXX format), webhook with idempotent processing + license email delivery via Resend.

landing-page.notes: 5.5.1-5.5.3 complete: hrcommandcenter.com updated with download page, purchase flow, legal/support pages.

beta-distribution.notes: 5.6.1-5.6.4 complete: Beta users identified, builds distributed, feedback collection set up.

pause-0a.notes: Tooling verified — Rust 1.92, Node 22.21, Tauri CLI 2.9.6

pause-1a.notes: Phase 1 complete: App runs, API key works, streaming chat, network detection

pause-2a.notes: Phase 2 complete: Context injection, query-adaptive retrieval, employee disambiguation, search debouncing all verified

pause-3a.notes: Phase 3 verified: PII redaction, notification, audit logging, error handling, offline mode all working

pause-4a.notes: Phase 4A verified: Onboarding flow + Settings panel both complete and tested

pause-v2.4.notes: V2.4 verified: Attention signals, DEI fairness lens, small-n suppression, disclaimers all working. Org chart deferred.

pause-v2.4.5.notes: V2.4.5 verified: All 28 audit findings remediated — parameterized SQL, Keychain, CSP, focus trap, screen reader charts, streaming perf, N+1 fix.

pause-5a.notes: Phase 5 verified: Distribution, trial infra, license system with seat limits, payment integration, landing page, beta distribution all complete. Remaining: Stripe live mode switch (5.5.5).
